'''''Night Havok''''' was a modified [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300]] light freighter owned and operated by [[Kara Saffch]] and her brother [[Willi Saffch]]. The ship was often used by them in their scavenging operations and in making cargo hauls in the area of [[Korbin]]. The ''Night Havok'' was prone to frequent mechanical trouble.

At one time the ''Night Havok'' was used by the Saffchs to transport black market medical supplies for the New Republic.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1992-06-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Two]]''
